svg.text: API name decryption — three resolver variants

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the API name ciphertext stored in PlugX?')
g.text: qmemcpy / QWORD literal — stored on stack

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the per-byte decryption loop used for API names in PlugX')
g.text: Key = (index − constant) — positional, no IV, no seed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the Variant A decryption algorithm in PlugX')
sendPrompt('Show me the Variant B decryption algorithm in PlugX')
sendPrompt('Show me the Variant C decryption algorithm in PlugX')
sendPrompt('How does the PEB walk API resolution work in PlugX?')
g.text: FS:[30h] → LDR → export table — no LoadLibrary / GetProcAddress

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens after the API pointer is resolved in PlugX?')
g.text: Stack buffer zeroed immediately after call

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which kernel32 APIs does PlugX resolve at runtime?')
sendPrompt('Which advapi32 APIs does PlugX resolve at runtime?')
sendPrompt('Which Winsock APIs does PlugX resolve at runtime?')
